channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Bins frequently blocking pavement. Ongoing issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abondoned untaxed vehicle, 26th April
item.description:
The vehicle has been parked on the street and not moved for at least 7 weeks and it’s not taxed either

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Corbylands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rusted pole close to collapse, 26th April
item.description:
White pole with no waiting sign has rusted through at base and is close to collapse.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass debris from a smashed window, 26th April
item.description:
I reported this before when it was on the pavement but nothing has been done, as you can see there is smashed glass gathered on the edge of the road/pavement from an incident. There are so many families and children that walk and play around here. Please get this sorted asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ru bishop blocking the pavement, more rubbish being added by passers by, 26th April
item.description:
This has been reported before, the rubbish belongs to 31 Cambridge Avenue Welling, but is on the pavement on Cumberland Avenue, it has been there for 4 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped carpet, 26th April
item.description:
Flytipped carpet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:
Graffiti on road sign

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bellot Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:
Graffiti on utility box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pile of rubbish, 26th April
item.description:
I know this site is often used for bulky waste collections but this is clearly just rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58a, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes close together on Upland Road near the junction with Barry Road, 26th April
item.description:
These potholes have been here for several months at least and are getting worse. The photo doesn't really show how deep the larger one is now. These potholes are in the middle of the westbound traffic lane and are a serious danger to cyclists. I cycle across this junction several times a week and it is becoming increasingly difficult to avoid the holes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:
Graffiti on bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dylan Road,DA17, 26th April
item.description:
This whole road is a complete mess and full of drug paraphernalia and small fly tips and excess litter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dylan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:
New graffiti on bridges

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich

item.title: Need action/clean, 26th April
item.description:
There’s a broken bottle glass pieces inside the kids playground and I really find it very dangerous , also so much rubbish (glyndon playground SE18 7NU)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Invermore Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 26th April
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti to entrance of flats, 26th April
item.description:
The graffiti on the front of the flats detracts from the building's appearance, creating an unsafe and neglected atmosphere. It can also foster a sense of vandalism or lower perceived safety for residents and visitors. Removing it promptly will help maintain the property's upkeep, ensure a welcoming environment, and uphold the council's standards for community spaces. Its been here for more than a year

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other items on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Double mattress and two cupboards dumped on pavement one third of the way down the hill on Erith road left hand pavement if heading towards Bexleyheath. Nearest junction for reference is Alberta road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is the view from my front garden, 26th April
item.description:
It’s grim. And it’s like this every day. Members of the public walk past and use it as a bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottom Douglas Road, 26th April
item.description:
House stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
